info.name: Tanium Connect API
info.description:
The Tanium Connect REST API allows creating, editing, and managing connections for delivering endpoint data to downstream systems. Connections link data sources (saved questions, event data, system status) to destinations (files, syslog, HTTP/webhooks, email, SQL databases) and can run on a schedule or be triggered by events. All endpoints are under the /plugin/products/connect/v1/ base path.

Contact Support:
 Name: Tanium Support

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier of the connection to run

request.description: Triggers an immediate execution of a connection outside of its normal schedule. This sends the current source data to the configured destination.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Enables a previously disabled connection, allowing it to run on its configured schedule.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Disables a connection, preventing it from running on its schedule. The connection configuration is preserved and can be re-enabled later.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Retrieves the full configuration and current status of a specific connection, including its source, destination, format, filter, and schedule settings.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Updates the configuration of an existing connection. All connections that share a destination are affected when the destination settings are changed.

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier of the connection to delete

request.description: Permanently deletes a connection and its associated schedule. The underlying source and destination configurations are not affected.

request.description: Retrieves a list of all configured connections. Each connection defines the link between a data source in Tanium and an external destination, along with formatting, filtering, and scheduling options.

request.description: Creates a new connection linking a data source to a destination with the specified format, filter, and schedule settings. The connection can be configured to deliver data as CSV, JSON, or CEF formats.

item.name: Get A Data Source By ID

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier of the data source

request.description: Retrieves the details of a specific data source, including its type, configuration, and available columns for output formatting.

request.description: Retrieves a list of all available data sources that can be used as connection sources. Sources include saved questions, question logs, system status data, and event-driven data from other Tanium modules.

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier of the destination to delete

request.description: Deletes a destination configuration. The destination cannot be deleted if it is currently used by any active connections.

request.description: Retrieves a list of all configured destinations. Destinations define where connection data is delivered, such as files, syslog servers, HTTP endpoints, email addresses, or SQL databases.
